series_metadata.series_description: All records pertaining to the issuance of bonds, including, but not limited to, applications, financial statements, reports, employee reports, annual reports, legal transcripts, notice of intent, notice of issuance, correspondence, ongoing audits and other records filed with and related to the bond issue.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain for period specified for electronic format, then destroy. If converted to electronic/digital format, paper records may be destroyed after verification of successful conversion. ; Electronic: Retain three (3) years after maturity or satisfaction of all obligations, then destroy. Statutory or regulatory provisions applicable to certain programs may affect retention of related records. In such cases, the statutory or regulatory provisions shall take precedence over the retention language set forth in this schedule. Records subject to audit shall be further retained until audit report is released and discrepancies addressed. LITIGATION HOLD: Any records subject to a litigation hold must be retained until the hold is lifted by the Legal Office, regardless of whether the specified retention period has elapsed., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Erase
